12.text: UPON the Consent Order dated 1 October (the “Order”) requiring the Claimants to produce certain categories of documents (the “Claimants’ Production”)

13.text: AND UPON the Claimants Part 32 offer dated 24 October 2024 (the “Claimants’ P32 Offer To Settle the Claim”) to settle their claims (the “Claim”)

14.text: AND UPON the Defendant accepting the Claimants’ P32 Offer To Settle the Claim on 29 October 2024

15.text: AND UPON the Parties having agreed to the terms set forth in this Consent Order

16.text: IT IS HEREBY ORDERED BY CONSENT THAT:

17.text:
1. By consent, the parties agree that the phrase “within 30 days from this Consent Order” at paragraph   
4 of the Order shall be amended as follows:

19.text: 2. There shall be no order as to costs.
